text.message: Brick port wasnt changing ur life

so I can get my game going?

anyone willing to trade me plow?
Seems like they want us to fight for it lol
I think red needs it to settle.
You should have gone 2910 like a good boy
best ows, road connect and super strong ore spot
I would be delighted if you would despair and quit
and that wood trade would be always on the table, if 8 rolled
Red could be super strong with a city
That’s the worst when you have a strong number and then it doesn’t roll u til after others are able to build on it
Black getting his illicit wood that he shouldn’t have gotten
I’m sorry to say I can never forgive you black
Blue and red both ahead of me with those devs

Can give wood whatnot sheep tho
I can do ore for nb
Red I asked not to be soloed anymore very politely
